sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-12-31 18:00:00');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = timestampadd(event_time, interval '2' month) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, timestampadd(event_time, interval '10' day) AS updated_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, timestampadd(timestamp '2022-01-01 12:00:00', interval '30' second) AS new_time FROM test_dates;
